description: Common Vaivora weapons not restricted to a specific class. Can equip multiple copies.

level_1_effect.description: Adds stats catered to fighting medium-size enemies. Greatly increases accuracy.

Bloody Fight.notes: You can equip as many copies of this vaivora as you want at the same time.

proc_mechanic.name: Concentrated Defence
proc_mechanic.trigger: Equipping shield in main or sub slot
effects: Apply [Concentrated Defence] buff to party members within 150 range
Decreases damage received from [Magic Circle], [Continual AoE] attacks by 5% * [number of shield equipped]
Decreases damage received from monster by 5% * [number of shield equipped]
Concentrated Defence effect doubles for 3 seconds when succeeding in Block

level_1_effect.description: Adds stats catered to fighting all monster race-types. Greatly increases accuracy.

Coordination.notes: You can equip as many copies of this vaivora as you want at the same time.

level_1_effect.description: 10% final increase in additional damage on attack.

level_4_effect.description: 20% final increase in additional damage on attack.

Echo.notes: Despite being common, this vision counts as a class-specific one.

Galimive Weapon.notes: This vision is pre-unlocked in your Equipment Storage. You can equip as many copies as you want at the same time.
